hero.subtitle: For developers and teams with multiple legitimate Trae accounts. Manual switching, all data stays local — no repeated logins.
hero.openSource: App & website MIT open source · auditable · stars & contributions welcome

download.label: Download
download.title: Download client
download.subtitle: Pick your OS, install, and open the app
download.macNote: macOS: if blocked as “damaged”, run in Terminal:
download.officialDesc: Download from {site} or TraeHop GitHub Releases for authentic, updatable builds. We cannot verify third-party repacks.

features.label: Features
features.title: Built for Trae multi-account
features.subtitle: Hop between Trae accounts — you focus on code
features.galleryHint: Drag or scroll to explore features

switch.title: Manual one-click switch
switch.desc: Switch accounts in one click: Trae restarts with the new session. Work, personal, and client accounts without re-login.

local.title: Local-only data
local.desc: Accounts, tokens, and cookies stay on your machine. We do not run any backend server.

login.title: Browser login
login.desc: Embedded login supports 2FA and OAuth — safer than copying tokens by hand.

usage.title: Usage monitor (optional)
usage.desc: View API usage and remaining quota per account — informational only, not tied to switching.

backup.title: Encrypted export
backup.desc: AES-256-GCM encrypted backups with notes, groups, and optional auto-backup.

tray.title: System tray
tray.desc: Quick manual switch from the menu bar or tray without breaking your flow.

notDo.title: What this tool does NOT do
items: Auto-switch when quota runs out
Upload credentials or chats to any server
Proxy or intercept Trae API traffic
Bulk register, resell, or share accounts

steps.label: Get Started
steps.title: Three steps to start
steps.subtitle: Install and manage your Trae accounts

1.title: Download & install
1.desc: Download the installer above, launch TraeHop, and accept the disclaimer.

2.title: Add accounts
2.desc: Browser login is recommended; or paste a token or import from Trae IDE. Confirm Trae path in Settings.

3.title: Switch
3.desc: Click Switch on an account card. Trae closes and reopens with that session. Save unsaved work first.

tutorial.label: Tutorial
tutorial.title: How to use
tutorial.subtitle: Add accounts, switch sessions, and back up

install.title: 1 Install TraeHop
items: Download the installer for your platform
Accept the disclaimer on first launch
If Trae is not found, set the executable path in Settings
install.tip: Intel Mac: x64 build. Apple Silicon: arm64 build.

add.title: 2 Add accounts
items: Browser login (recommended): Add → Browser login
Paste token from Trae devtools
Import current session from Trae IDE
add.tip: Use notes and groups to organize by project or client.

switch.title: 3 Switch accounts
items: Click Switch on the target account
TraeHop closes Trae, writes session files and device ID
Trae IDE restarts logged in as that account
switch.warn: Save unsaved code before switching — Trae will restart.

advanced.title: 4 Advanced: reset environment
items: Only when sessions are corrupted
Clears cache, preferences, and resets device IDs
May trigger platform risk controls or violate ToS — use with care
advanced.tip: For daily use, prefer normal Switch.

backup.title: 5 Backup & export
items: Enable auto local backup in Settings
Export with optional AES encryption
Import on a new machine to restore accounts

session.label: Trae session
session.value: Written to Trae IDE local App Support on switch

q1.q: Trae did not reopen after switch?
q1.a: Check Trae path in Settings. Try auto-scan or pick the executable manually.

q2.a: Ensure the token is complete and not expired. Prefer browser login or cookie refresh.

q3.q: Trae still shows the old account?
q3.a: Close Trae manually, then use Environment clean or Reset & switch in TraeHop.

q4.a: No. Everything stays on your machine. TraeHop does not use our servers.

q5.a: macOS and Windows only, matching Trae IDE.

q6.a: May violate Trae ToS. Use only accounts you own. You assume all risks.

q7.a: Encrypted export or auto backup in Settings. Keep your password and files safe.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
items: For accounts you own and registered legitimately under Trae terms
All data stored locally — no remote upload
Manual switching only — no auto-rotate on quota exhaustion
Advanced features may trigger platform risk controls
You assume all risks including account suspension
disclaimer.accept: Using the client means you accept these terms

footer.tagline: Hop between your Trae accounts locally
